arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Mudryk interest CONFIRMED, Isak TRUTH, Disasi to LEAVE?
arts.sum: The 23-year-old has been linked with a January exit, amid reported interest from the likes of Crystal Palace and Newcastle United, and Vadim Shabliy, his agent, has confirmed that clubs are monitoring his client. FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including the latest on Mykhailo Mudryk, Alexander Isak and Axel Disasi .

arts.ttl: Chelsea set for boost after £780m development offers summer hope
arts.sum: Chelsea look set to be in line for a significant financial boost after FIFA finally managed to sell the broadcast rights for next summer’s Club World Cup at a huge sum. But this week it was announced that DAZN had acquired the rights to broadcast for a sum of around $1bn (£780m), a development that will embolden competing clubs in putting their eggs in the Club World Cup basket, with sums of as much as $50m (£39.2m) each for those taking part mooted.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer reveals HUGE target he has set himself - as Chelsea star outlines the club's ambitions this season after flying start under Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: The forward swapped Manchester City for the Blues in the summer of 2023 and has been the club's standout performer in the last 18 months. He has scored nine goals and created six this campaign.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard can help Chelsea complete four January transfers with £17m solution - Amie Wilson
arts.sum: The 22-year-old spent the second half of last season on loan with Swedish side Brommapojkarna - but his only appearances for the Blues since his return has been for the development squad in Premier League 2 and the EFL Trophy. Centre-back Wilson has been a regular with Chelsea's development squad in Premier League 2 and the EFL Trophy this season after stepping up from the club's U18 side.

arts.ttl: Casadei: Four Serie A clubs including Juventus interested in Chelsea deal
arts.sum: Empoli are the latest Serie A side to register an interest in signing Italy U21...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Chelsea predictions: Blues to compound misery for sorry Spurs
arts.sum: There is no stopping Chelsea right now and Steve Davies believes it's the ideal time for Enzo Maresca to be taking the Blues to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to face slipping Spurs.

arts.ttl: 'At the moment': Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou delivers verdict on Chelsea ahead of Sunday's match
arts.sum: Tottenham and Chelsea are in contrasting form going into this weekend’s London derby. Spurs host Chelsea on Sunday afternoon in the Premier League, but it’s...
